semantic.role: View artifact producer that evaluates loaded code units to identify, score, and rank symbols forming the project's public API surface.
responsibilities: Classify each spine unit into a PublicSurfaceKind (function, class, CLI command, HTTP handler, etc.) using heuristics on the unit symbol data.
Score each candidate symbol based on documentation presence, naming convention compliance, re-export depth, and structural importance.
Filter out suppressed paths (via isSuppressedPath) to exclude noise like test files or temporary artifacts.
Sort and rank candidates by totalScore and remainingScore, capping the list to a manageable size.
Build and return a IViewArtifactEnvelope carrying IPublicSurfaceViewItem[], including metadata (schemaVersion, totalCount, score, confidence).
outOfScope: Rendering the public surface view into a human-readable format (delegated to ViewRenderer).
Orchestrating the full view pipeline (handled by view-service.ts or view-server.ts).
Interacting with the runtime database or external configuration systems.
Defining the protocol types themselves (imported from ../../types/).
invariants: The output artifact envelope must always set metadata.schemaVersion to CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION.
Every non-suppressed LoadedUnit must produce at most one ScoredCandidate entry.
Scoring computation must be deterministic for identical input units.
The totalScore at the envelope level is derived from aggregated subset of individual candidate scores.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a self-contained, scored public surface view artifact for the ArchSpine mirror system, enabling other system components (rendering, dashboard, agents) to understand the externally visible API of the scanned project.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent change intent provided; the file appears to be stable as part of the view subsystem.

publicSurface.description: Main entry point that consumes an array of LoadedUnit objects, filters and scores each unit into a ScoredCandidate, sorts by score, and returns an IViewArtifactEnvelope with IPublicSurfaceViewItem data. Called by the view runtime or view server to produce the public-surface artifact.
